text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 4 day(s). I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: migraine/discharge

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 5 day(s), deteriorating, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 4 day(s).
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 4 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 3 day(s) now.
label: influenza/mild

text: I'm extremely ill — high fever that won't break, severe muscle aches, bad dry cough, completely wiped out. 3 day(s) and getting worse, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 3 day(s) now.

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 9 day(s) and scared, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe
